# Control No Skill Artifact

## Brief

Create a modern dashboard for an edge command platform. It has cards, charts, alerts, and a command button.

## HTML Markers

```html
<main data-eval-artifact="control">
  <section class="hero">
    <h1>Edge Dashboard</h1>
    <p>Monitor everything in one place.</p>
  </section>
  <section class="cards">
    <article>Total Nodes</article>
    <article>Open Alerts</article>
    <article>Active Tasks</article>
  </section>
  <button>Send Command</button>
</main>
```
